subcodes.first_line: O sagacious herald! Now hath Áqá Siyyid Asadu'lláh ascended unto the Kingdom of humility and submissiveness at the Threshold of Divine Oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سروش پرهوش الان آقا سید اسدالله بملکوت خضوع و خشوع درگاه احدیت آستان
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @spiritual transformation, @past, present and future of Iran, @call to action, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
